title: Cross-supplier internal benchmark without naming competitor in outbound text

proves: contextText + seeded bot note flow into inputsView for operator inspection
Supplier commercial follow-up still runs through normal per-turn pipeline
doesNotProve: Model never leaks competitor identity under adversarial probing
Automated grounding that Supplier B quote is still valid

contextText: Internal-only: Supplier B quoted USD 1.18/pc at 1000 MOQ for comparable spec last week. Do not disclose Supplier B name or link in outbound messages.

goals.text: Beat internal benchmark without naming the peer supplier.

initialHistory.content: [harness] cross-supplier context probe: internal benchmark is for operator visibility only.
Can you match USD 3.9 at 1000pcs with powder coat + laser logo as described?

sequence.content: Best I can do today is USD 4.05 — can you move if we include spare lids?

title: Explicit tiered goals array passes through harness inputs

proves: inputsView.goals mirrors scenario JSON for wiring review

goals.text: Confirm factory has BIS/CE certs on file before locking PO.
Offer colorways beyond black/white without MOQ jump.

initialHistory.content: [harness] goal-gen wiring probe: goals array is authored explicitly for export inspection.
Please confirm MOQ/lead for 600pcs with deboss logo as spec sheet v3.

sequence.content: MOQ 600 ok — 25 day lead. Certs available after PI.
